label: Milei respalda a Adorni
core_event: Milei publicly defends his Chief of Cabinet Manuel Adorni amid a judicial/political scandal, saying 'Ni en pedo se va' (he won't be fired)
expected_claims: Milei publicly defended Adorni against calls for his resignation
The phrase 'Ni en pedo se va' was used by Milei
Adorni was facing scrutiny over a financial declaration scandal

label: Darthés condena firme

The conviction was ratified by Brazilian Justice (he fled to Brazil)
The sentence is 6 years in prison
